title: Quantum Shortest Path Algorithms
description: Explore quantum algorithms for finding shortest paths in graphs. Learn about quantum speedups for single-source and all-pairs shortest path problems using quantum walks and Grover search.
learningObjectives: Understand classical shortest path algorithms (Dijkstra, Bellman-Ford)
Apply Grover search to path finding problems
Implement quantum walk-based shortest path algorithms
Analyze quantum speedups for different graph structures
Compare quantum vs classical complexity for shortest path
Design hybrid quantum-classical path finding strategies
